channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: A lower volume of polyethylene glycol with ascorbate (MoviPrep) may improve bowel cleansing prior to colonoscopy
item.description: 1. 1 litre polyethylene glycol with ascorbate (1L-PEG-Asc) showed superior bowel cleansing efficacy compared to 2 litre polyethylene glycol with ascor...

item.title: Intra-arterial alteplase after thrombectomy improves three-month functional recovery in large vessel stroke
item.description: 1. Adding a thrombolytic agent delivered through the arterial catheter immediately following mechanical clot extraction increased near-complete functi...

item.title: Three medical routines that older people may not need

item.title: Researchers shape guidance for cancer screening
